data.title: Smart Driving Equality: A Battle For Control Of An Emerging Industry
data.description: As smart driving features trickle down to budget cars, upstream suppliers are downgraded from solution providers to low-margin parts vendors.

data.title: Xi Jinping Hits Back: China Raises Tariffs On US Goods To 84%, Doubling Down On Trade War
data.description: China has unveiled a significant hike in retaliatory tariffs on U.S. products, intensifying the ongoing trade war between the world's two biggest economies.

data.title: 21Shares Launches Dogecoin Fund Backed By Dogecoin Foundation
data.description: 21Shares, one of the largest issuers of crypto exchange-traded products (ETPs), has officially launched the 21Shares Dogecoin ETP, the first Dogecoin-backed product endorsed by the Doge

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Anixa Biosciences Receives Key US Patent Nod For Breast Cancer Vaccine Patent
data.description: Anixa secures USPTO patent for its breast cancer vaccine using α-lactalbumin, enhancing its IP portfolio and expanding future immunotherapy options.

data.title: Widening Credit Spreads Signal Potential Bitcoin Bear Market, 10X Research Warns
data.description: 10X Research has identified a historically consistent warning sign of a Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) bear market now flashing red: the widening of U.S. corporate credit spreads.
